hero.disclaimer.body: No Malaysian merchant has been live for 90 days on KiX yet. The cases below are operator-archetype profiles, with CPA/CAC numbers derived from (a) our 5 Singapore F&B pilots over similar verticals and (b) TikTok Ads Manager benchmarks for MY F&B 2024–2026. Real Malaysian merchant cases will replace these by Q4 2026.
